title: Opportunity Radar
search_focus: Configurable public opportunity radar for software engineering, data/AI, product, security, research, leadership, and adjacent roles.

role_profiles.label: Software Engineering
skillsets: System design, production debugging, API design, automated testing, and maintainable service ownership.
certifications: Cloud practitioner or associate developer certification only if the target role is cloud-heavy; otherwise prioritize a production-quality portfolio project.
learning_gaps: Show one shipped project with tests, observability, deployment notes, and clear tradeoff decisions.

role_profiles.label: Data / AI Engineering
skillsets: Data pipelines, model evaluation, feature stores or embeddings, deployment, monitoring, and cost/performance tradeoffs.
certifications: Cloud data/ML engineer certification aligned to the employer stack, or a hands-on MLOps specialization.
learning_gaps: Publish an end-to-end data or ML project with ingestion, evaluation, deployment, and monitoring evidence.

role_profiles.label: Product / Program Leadership
skillsets: Roadmap framing, customer discovery, prioritization, metrics, stakeholder management, and crisp execution narratives.
certifications: Pragmatic Institute, Reforge, or equivalent product strategy coursework if the role expects formal product leadership vocabulary.
learning_gaps: Prepare two stories showing ambiguous problem framing, prioritization, tradeoffs, launch, and measured outcome.

role_profiles.label: Cybersecurity / Trust
skillsets: Threat modeling, secure design review, exploitability triage, incident response, detection, and engineering-ready remediation.
certifications: Choose role-aligned depth: OSCP/OSWE for offensive roles, CSSLP for secure SDLC, CISSP/CISM for leadership, or cloud security specialty for platform roles.
learning_gaps: Keep public-safe case studies that show risk, proof, mitigation, and verification without exposing private details.

role_profiles.label: Design / UX Research
skillsets: Portfolio storytelling, user research synthesis, interaction flows, design systems, accessibility, and product impact measurement.
certifications: Accessibility training such as WCAG-focused coursework if the role emphasizes inclusive design or design systems.
learning_gaps: Prepare case studies that connect user evidence to product decisions and measurable outcomes.
